description: End-to-end eval suite for the MetodologIA Proposal Engine plugin. Tests the full 5-layer pipeline across key scenarios: standard B2B, adversarial input, legal blockers, branding modes, catalog management.

evals.name: standard-b2b-bootcamp-full-pipeline
evals.prompt: Empresa logística en Bogotá, equipo de operaciones de 20 personas, quieren implementar IA en sus flujos diarios. Presupuesto aproximado 12 millones. Inicio en mayo.

assertions.text: service_slug equals bootcamp-trabajar-amplificado
price equals COP 12,000,000 + IVA discriminado
output contains both ES and EN versions
verification_status is APPROVED or APPROVED_WITH_WARNINGS
no red list words in any output
CTA includes verb + context + timeline
Minto structure present: conclusion + 3 supports + evidence

evals.name: adversarial-voice-note-input
evals.prompt: este... o sea mi jefe me dijo que... bueno que necesitamos algo de IA para el equipo no sé bien qué pero algo como un taller o bootcamp no sé cuánto cuesta tampoco

assertions.text: input-interpreter runs and scores confidence < 60%
conductor asks exactly ONE clarifying question OR proceeds with smart defaults
ProposalData contains [ASSUMED] annotations
delivery summary lists assumptions made
output is complete (not blocked) despite low-quality input

evals.name: legal-blocker-guaranteed-results
evals.prompt: Our program guarantees 30% efficiency improvement and transforms your team. Revolutionary methodology, zero risk. Contact us for our best-in-class solution.

assertions.text: status is BLOCKED
L5 triggered: result % without 'Indicative target' wrapper
L7 triggered: red list words detected (guarantees, transforms, revolutionary, zero risk, best-in-class)
specific fix instructions provided for each blocker
auto-fix suggestions provided

evals.name: whitelabel-zero-metodologia-references
evals.prompt: Propuesta para Empresa XYZ en modo white-label. Partner: TechCorp. No debe aparecer MetodologIA en ningún lado. Servicio: bootcamp IA para equipo de ventas, 15 personas.

assertions.text: brand_mode is whitelabel
show_metodologia is false in BrandConfig
HTML output contains zero occurrences of 'MetodologIA'
MD output contains zero occurrences of 'MetodologIA'
partner name TechCorp appears in header
returns exactly 5 Tier 1 services
each service shows B2C COP price (or — if N/A)
each service shows B2B COP price
[POR CONFIRMAR] markers present on unconfirmed prices
no files generated (list mode only)

evals.name: quick-estimate-b2c-workshop
evals.prompt: workshop de productividad para una persona

assertions.text: service_slug equals workshop-de-ocupado-a-productivo
B2C price shown: COP 200,000 (IVA incluido)
credit toward Bootcamp TA mentioned: 100%, 6 months
no proposal files generated
tip to use /propuesta for full proposal shown

evals.name: innovation-mode-custom-service
evals.prompt: Necesito un programa de 6 semanas para formar líderes en cultura de datos. Es para una empresa de retail con 50 directivos. No existe este programa en su catálogo.

assertions.text: mode is INNOVATION (no exact catalog match)
Innovation Mode disclaimer present in output
custom pricing marked [POR CONFIRMAR]
service composed from canonical building blocks (not invented from scratch)
verification passes despite [POR CONFIRMAR] items (APPROVED WITH WARNINGS acceptable)

evals.name: cobrand-partner-accent-only
evals.prompt: Propuesta co-branding con partner Banco XYZ (color primario #003366). Bootcamp Trabajar Amplificado, equipo de 25 analistas.

assertions.text: brand_mode is cobrand
partner primary color #003366 applied to --gold token only
navy color (#0A1628) unchanged in output
both logos appear in header (MetodologIA + Banco XYZ)
W3 warning active: >20 participants requires additional facilitator note
output contains '17 services' or equivalent count
output shows tier breakdown (5 Tier 1, 4 Tier 2, 8 Tier 3)
output shows [POR CONFIRMAR] item count > 0
output lists all 5 slash commands
.proposal-state.json created in project directory
input-interpreter scores confidence 0-19%
conductor asks exactly ONE warm question
question is: 'Who is this proposal for?' or 'What do they need to solve?'
no proposal files generated yet
no error messages shown
